item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com Mexico’s World Cup performance …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Mexico’s World Cup performance “has united millions of fans in jubilation at a tense political moment,” Ioan Grillo writes. “In my quarter-century living in Mexico City, I had never witnessed the level of euphoria that this tournament has unleashed.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Mexico’s World Cup performance “has united millions of fans in jubilation at a tense political moment,” Ioan Grillo writes. “In my quarter-century living in Mexico City, I had never witnessed the level of euphoria that this tournament has unleashed.”

item.title: Shadcn/UI は Radix の代わりにデフォルトで Base UI を使うようになりました。 Shadcn/UI…

item.description:
Shadcn/UI は Radix の代わりにデフォルトで Base UI を使うようになりました。
Shadcn/UI now defaults to Base UI instead of Radix

🔺 271
💬 28
🔗 HN Post | Article
item.content:encoded:

Shadcn/UI now defaults to Base UI instead of Radix

💬 28
🔗 HN Post | Article

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Te…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月05日 日曜日☁☂️ 室温27.4℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠 汗でビショビショ…🫠 今日も1…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。
item.content:encoded:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。

item.title: The most stunning controversy of the World Cup erupted after…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: The most stunning controversy of the World Cup erupted after it emerged that President Trump personally intervened to have U.S. striker Folarin Balogun reinstated for the team’s game against Belgium following his red card in the previous round. on.wsj.com/4poqgEN
item.content:encoded: The most stunning controversy of the World Cup erupted after it emerged that President Trump personally intervened to have U.S. striker Folarin Balogun reinstated for the team’s game against Belgium following his red card in the previous round. on.wsj.com/4poqgEN

item.title: お昼ごはん おにぎりとスープのセット おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、…
item.author: ぱん (@yyy950921.bsky.social)
item.description:
お昼ごはん
おにぎりとスープのセット
おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、全体的にやさしい味付けなのも好み！
item.content:encoded:
お昼ごはん
おにぎりとスープのセット
おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、全体的にやさしい味付けなのも好み！

item.title: 【スパーダ】 自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。 目に光を与えないこと…
item.author: 朽木桜斎（くちき おうさい） (@kuchiki-ohsai.bsky.social)
item.description:
【スパーダ】

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

目に光を与えないことで虚無を表現できると山田玲司先生がおっしゃっておりました🤔
item.content:encoded:
【スパーダ】

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

item.title: The idea that a philosophy degree is a ticket to a lifetime …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The idea that a philosophy degree is a ticket to a lifetime of underemployment persists. But A.I. labs have been recruiting thinkers to address big questions.
item.content:encoded: The idea that a philosophy degree is a ticket to a lifetime of underemployment persists. But A.I. labs have been recruiting thinkers to address big questions.

item.title: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch i…
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.
item.content:encoded: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー CLI向けブラックボックス E2E テストランナー nao1215/atago を作った話 前書き…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
CLI向けブラックボックス E2E テストランナー nao1215/atago を作った話

前書き：LLM の登場で自作 OSS の E2E テストを書く機会が増えた#LLM が登場してから、E2E（End to End） テストを書くのが楽になりました。維持は相変わらず大変ですが。 具体例としては、業務では k1LoW/runn を利用して API をシナリオベースで E2E したり、プライベートでは shellspec/shellspec を使って CLI のブ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
CLI向けブラックボックス E2E テストランナー nao1215/atago を作った話

前書き：LLM の登場で自作 OSS の E2E テストを書く機会が増えた#LLM が登場してから、E2E（End to End） テストを書くのが楽になりました。維持は相変わらず大変ですが。 具体例としては、業務では k1LoW/runn を利用して API をシナリオベースで E2E したり、プライベートでは shellspec/shellspec を使って CLI のブ...

item.title: おはようございます！(:D)┓ いつもの都営～ 【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下…
item.author: ヂーゼル機関車《masashi》 (@dieselloco.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway

item.title: SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！ 生き物や料理のグ…
item.author: 白頁夾コーギョ (@hakuyoukyokogyo.bsky.social)
item.description:
SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！
生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ
#ハンドメイド　#イベント　#北海道
item.content:encoded:
SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！
生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ
#ハンドメイド　#イベント　#北海道

item.title: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revis…
item.author: rei🚩 (@reispy.bsky.social)
item.description: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revisasse o cartão vermelho dado a Balogun. Hoje, saiu a notícia de que a FIFA suspendeu a punição do jogador estadunidense. Tem algo muito estranho acontecendo nesta Copa. 🧐🤔
item.content:encoded: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revisasse o cartão vermelho dado a Balogun. Hoje, saiu a notícia de que a FIFA suspendeu a punição do jogador estadunidense. Tem algo muito estranho acontecendo nesta Copa. 🧐🤔

item.title: 福島県の山中で新潟市の男性2人救助、けがなし 尾瀬で登山中に道に迷う
item.author: 47NEWS (@47news.jp)

item.title: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.
item.content:encoded: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.

item.title: Rapaz, isso aqui é uma VERGONHA sem tamanho! A FIFA retirou …
item.author: Lázaro Rosa 🇧🇷 (@lazarorosa.bsky.social)
item.description:
Rapaz, isso aqui é uma VERGONHA sem tamanho! A FIFA retirou a suspensão aplicada ao atacante estadunidense Folarin Balogun após Trump ameaçar “cancelar completamente” a Copa do Mundo no país.

Trump comemorou: “Obrigado à FIFA por fazer o que era certo e reverter uma grande injustiça!”
item.content:encoded:
Rapaz, isso aqui é uma VERGONHA sem tamanho! A FIFA retirou a suspensão aplicada ao atacante estadunidense Folarin Balogun após Trump ameaçar “cancelar completamente” a Copa do Mundo no país.

Trump comemorou: “Obrigado à FIFA por fazer o que era certo e reverter uma grande injustiça!”

item.author: Gneppikx (@gneppikx.bsky.social)

item.title: Gaspésie, Quebec “Recognized by National Geographic Travele…
item.author: 🇨🇦 👊🇨🇦 (@sorry-iamcanadian.bsky.social)
item.description:
Gaspésie, Quebec

“Recognized by National Geographic Traveler as one of Canada’s 50 Places of a Lifetime, …

discover four national parks; famous Percé Rock…moose; summits over 1000 metres (3300 feet); lighthouses; Chaleur Bay…”

www.quebecmaritime.ca/en/discover-...

#Canada
#Quebec
item.content:encoded:
Gaspésie, Quebec

“Recognized by National Geographic Traveler as one of Canada’s 50 Places of a Lifetime, …

discover four national parks; famous Percé Rock…moose; summits over 1000 metres (3300 feet); lighthouses; Chaleur Bay…”

www.quebecmaritime.ca/en/discover-...

#Canada
#Quebec

item.title: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning to rethink the true meaning of wealth. Perhaps the greatest treasures are not hidden underground at all. They are the living landscapes that sustain life itself and make our planet a place we can call home.
item.content:encoded: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning to rethink the true meaning of wealth. Perhaps the greatest treasures are not hidden underground at all. They are the living landscapes that sustain life itself and make our planet a place we can call home.

item.title: The Fourth of July fireworks display in the capital impacted…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The Fourth of July fireworks display in the capital impacted the amount of fine particulate matter in the atmosphere.
item.content:encoded: The Fourth of July fireworks display in the capital impacted the amount of fine particulate matter in the atmosphere.

item.title: Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly fabricated bite mark analysis helped convict him of murder. After 28 years in prison, he is officially free.

The Louisiana Supreme Court called the evidence against him "scientifically indefensible."

with @veritenews.org
item.content:encoded:
Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly fabricated bite mark analysis helped convict him of murder. After 28 years in prison, he is officially free.

The Louisiana Supreme Court called the evidence against him "scientifically indefensible."

with @veritenews.org

item.title: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated out…
item.author: Gerry Hassan (@gerryhassan.bsky.social)
item.description: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated outside Falkirk they are the world's largest equine structures. Designed by Andy Scott & sitting by the Forth & Clyde Canal they are a tribute to Scotland's industrial heritage & the working horses that powered its canals.
item.content:encoded: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated outside Falkirk they are the world's largest equine structures. Designed by Andy Scott & sitting by the Forth & Clyde Canal they are a tribute to Scotland's industrial heritage & the working horses that powered its canals.

item.title: Two recently fledged Red-tailed Hawks following each other a…
item.author: Jocelyn Anderson Photography (@jocelynanderson.bsky.social)
item.description: Two recently fledged Red-tailed Hawks following each other around and exploring the woods.
item.content:encoded: Two recently fledged Red-tailed Hawks following each other around and exploring the woods.
